message:
bd-2nkmi.8: add color-coded timing thresholds to mega showcase metrics panel

The metrics side panel now renders Parse/Layout/Render/Total timing values
with color-coded thresholds (green=good, yellow=ok, red=bad). Budget
exceeded warnings and error indicators are highlighted in red. Cache
hit/miss status uses green/yellow respectively.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
